subcodes.first_line: That which was inscribed hath become manifest, and that which lay concealed hath been made known. Praise be unto God, that the fruits of the trees [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه مسطور آمد مشهود گشت و هرچه مستور بود مشهور آمد حمد خدا را که ثمرات شجرات
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prophecy and fulfillment
